output_text:
type DriverId inherits String
type RiderId inherits String
type VehicleId inherits String
type RideId inherits String

enum RideStatus {
    REQUESTED,
    MATCHED,
    IN_PROGRESS,
    COMPLETED,
    CANCELLED
}

model Driver {
    driverId : DriverId
    name : String
    licenseNumber : String?
}

model Rider {
    riderId : RiderId
    name : String
    phoneNumber : String?
}

model Vehicle {
    vehicleId : VehicleId
    make : String
    model : String
    licensePlate : String
    driverId : DriverId?
}

model Ride {
    rideId : RideId
    riderId : RiderId
    driverId : DriverId?
    vehicleId : VehicleId?
    pickupLocation : String
    dropoffLocation : String
    status : RideStatus
    createdAt : Instant
    completedAt : Instant?
}

service RideService {
    operation requestRide(riderId : RiderId, pickupLocation : String, dropoffLocation : String) : Ride
    operation matchDriver(rideId : RideId, driverId : DriverId, vehicleId : VehicleId) : Ride
    operation completeRide(rideId : RideId, completedAt : Instant) : Ride
    operation cancelRide(rideId : RideId) : Ride
}

output_text:
type CustomerId inherits String
type AddressId inherits String
type ProductId inherits String
type OrderId inherits String
type ShipmentId inherits String

model Address {
  addressId : AddressId
  street : String
  city : String
  state : String?
  postalCode : String
  country : String
}

model Customer {
  customerId : CustomerId
  name : String
  email : String?
  addresses : Address[]
}

model Product {
  productId : ProductId
  name : String
  description : String?
  price : Decimal
}

model LineItem {
  productId : ProductId
  quantity : Int
  unitPrice : Decimal
}

model Order {
  orderId : OrderId
  customerId : CustomerId
  lineItems : LineItem[]
  createdAt : Instant
  status : OrderStatus
}

enum OrderStatus {
  Pending,
  Confirmed,
  Processing,
  Shipped,
  Delivered,
  Cancelled
}

model Shipment {
  shipmentId : ShipmentId
  orderId : OrderId
  destinationAddress : Address
  shippedAt : Instant?
  deliveredAt : Instant?
}

service OrderService {
  operation createOrder(order : Order) : Order
  operation getOrder(orderId : OrderId) : Order?
  write operation shipOrder(shipment : Shipment) : Shipment
}

output_text:
type AuthorId inherits String
type ArticleId inherits String
type CommentId inherits String

enum ArticleStatus {
    DRAFT,
    PUBLISHED,
    ARCHIVED
}

model Author {
    authorId : AuthorId inherits String
    name : Name inherits String
    email : Email inherits String
}

model Article {
    articleId : ArticleId inherits String
    author : AuthorId inherits String
    title : Title inherits String
    content : Content inherits String
    status : ArticleStatus
    createdAt : Instant
    publishedAt? : Instant
}

model Comment {
    commentId : CommentId inherits String
    articleId : ArticleId inherits String
    author : AuthorId inherits String
    content : Content inherits String
    createdAt : Instant
}

model Like {
    articleId : ArticleId inherits String
    authorId : AuthorId inherits String
    createdAt : Instant
}

service BlogService {
    operation createDraft(authorId : AuthorId, title : Title, content : Content) : Article
    operation publishArticle(articleId : ArticleId) : Article
    write operation addComment(articleId : ArticleId, authorId : AuthorId, content : Content) : Comment
    operation listComments(articleId : ArticleId) : Comment[]
    write operation likeArticle(articleId : ArticleId, authorId : AuthorId) : Like
}

output_text:
type ShipmentId inherits String
type ReceivingNoteId inherits String

enum ReceiptStatus {
    Pending(0),
    PartiallyReceived(1),
    FullyReceived(2),
    DiscrepancyReported(3)
}

model InboundShipment {
    shipmentId : ShipmentId
    supplierName : String
    expectedItems : ItemLineItem[]
    estimatedArrivalDate : Date?
}

model ItemLineItem {
    sku : String
    description : String
    quantityExpected : Int
    unitOfMeasure : String?
}

model ReceivingNote {
    receivingNoteId : ReceivingNoteId
    shipmentId : ShipmentId
    receivedItems : ReceivedItemLineItem[]
    status : ReceiptStatus
    recordedAt : Instant
    notes : String?
}

model ReceivedItemLineItem {
    sku : String
    quantityReceived : Int
    unitOfMeasure : String?
    discrepancyReason : DiscrepancyReason?
}

enum DiscrepancyReason {
    Shortage(0),
    Excess(1),
    Damaged(2),
    WrongItem(3),
    NoDiscrepancy(4)
}

model Discrepancy {
    receivingNoteId : ReceivingNoteId
    sku : String
    expectedQuantity : Int
    receivedQuantity : Int
    reason : DiscrepancyReason
    reportedAt : Instant
}

service ReceivingService {
    operation recordInbound(shipmentId : ShipmentId, supplierName : String, expectedItems : ItemLineItem[], estimatedArrivalDate? : Date?) : InboundShipment
    write operation recordReceipt(receivingNoteId : ReceivingNoteId, receivedItems : ReceivedItemLineItem[], notes? : String) : ReceivingNote
    operation listDiscrepancies() : Discrepancy[]
}

type TrialId inherits String
type CohortId inherits String
type EnrolmentId inherits String
type PatientId inherits String
type EventId inherits String

enum TrialStatus {
    Recruiting,
    Active,
    Completed,
    Suspended,
    Terminated
}

enum EventSeverity {
    Mild,
    Moderate,
    Severe,
    LifeThreatening,
    Fatal
}

model Trial {
    trialId : TrialId
    title : String
    description : String?
    status : TrialStatus
    startDate : Date
    endDate : Date?
}

model Cohort {
    cohortId : CohortId
    trialId : TrialId
    name : String
    description : String?
    targetEnrollmentCount : Int
}

model Patient {
    patientId : PatientId
    firstName : String
    lastName : String
    dateOfBirth : Date?
    gender : String?
}

model Enrolment {
    enrolmentId : EnrolmentId
    patientId : PatientId
    cohortId : CohortId
    enrolmentDate : Date
    withdrawalDate : Date?
}

model TrialEvent {
    eventId : EventId
    trialId : TrialId
    cohortId : CohortId?
    patientId : PatientId
    eventType : String
    eventDate : Date
    severity : EventSeverity?
    description : String?
}

service TrialService {
    operation createTrial(trial : Trial) : Trial
    operation enrolPatient(enrolment : Enrolment) : Enrolment
    operation recordEvent(event : TrialEvent) : TrialEvent
}

find { TrialEvent[] }
